claimText: Khichan Wetland is located in Rajasthan's Thar Desert and hosts wintering flocks of migratory demoiselle cranes.
evidenceExcerpt: Khichan Wetland in Rajasthan's Thar Desert hosts wintering flocks of migratory demoiselle cranes.
examUse: Correct-pair questions matching wetlands to their states or key species.

claimText: Menar Wetland Complex is a freshwater monsoon wetland in Rajasthan that hosts critically endangered white-rumped and long-billed vultures.
evidenceExcerpt: Menar Wetland Complex is a freshwater monsoon wetland hosting critically endangered vultures.
examUse: Statement-based questions on wetland characteristics and associated endangered species.

claimText: Siliserh Lake is a human-made wetland situated in the buffer region of the Sariska tiger reserve in Rajasthan.
evidenceExcerpt: Siliserh Lake in Rajasthan is a human-made wetland located in the buffer region of the Sariska tiger reserve
examUse: Statement-based questions linking wetlands to protected areas.

claimText: Siliserh Lake was created on a tributary of the River Ruparel.
